MASTER CALENDAR JURY

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-02-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff, 155 Turk Street is present. Represented by Richard Rehl.
Attorney, Daniel Stern, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendants, Jonas Pardillo and Rosita Pardillo , are present.
Attorney, Shirley Huang , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Barbara Anscher, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 304B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
This case settled, the trial date of SEP-07-2010 is vacated.
